title: Music Box
description: Punch songs on the Note Grid and play it with the Music Box!
body: # Music box ![Awl, Note Grid, Music Box](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iVwaeEOr/images/7f0ab47113791bacae645676b6657868cabfc626.png) **Punch songs on the Note Grid and play it with the Music Box!** ## Preview ↑ Enjoy the music. ↑ Output different signals according to the content of the note grid with the comparator. ↑ Punching holes at the perforation table for the note grid. # Get details on [GitHub](https://github.com/C20C01/MusicBox/blob/main/README.md) # Enjoy😘
